_note: The tightening case: TWO header anchors agree with EACH OTHER (gross_minus_tax = 1050-50 = 1000; goods_minus_settlement = 1200-200 = 1000) but the line-sum (800.00) does NOT back them. Headers confirming each other without the lines must NOT tie — the lines are the authority. Reconciler must fail closed; validator must still block.
